mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, dv.generic_name as drug_name FROM medication_records mr LEFT JOIN drugs_vaccines dv ON mr.drug_id = dv.id ORDER BY mr.event_time DESC
SELECT mr.*, dv.generic_name as drug_name FROM medication_records mr LEFT JOIN drugs_vaccines dv ON mr.drug_id = dv.id WHERE mr.ear_tag = #{earTag} ORDER BY mr.event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medication_records (ear_tag, drug_id, reason, event_time, dosage, operator) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{drugId}, #{reason}, #{eventTime}, #{dosage}, #{operator})
